haikus.haiku:
Cool scoop in my hand,
Melting sweetly, rich delight,
Chocolate dreams abound.
Happy #NationalChocolateIceCreamDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Dapper ties arranged,
Colors dance with bright sunlight,
Style wrapped in pure cheer.
Happy #NationalBowtieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors dance and sway,
Brush strokes of joy embrace life,
Art blooms in warm light.
#HappyBirthdayPaulGauguin from @ClamBakeSanta
